Comment.value: Called from Create new title Step 2 SRV - normally called from Server
Can also be called from Title Setting when user selects Re-import theme - then $re_import = true
Two variables below - only when called from Title Settings and a theme exist

Calculation.Text: Theme Template @ FAT Theme::Side Menu Icon
Theme Template @ FAT Theme::Block Divider Image

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Theme::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "theme" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Theme::Logo scroll media id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Theme::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "theme" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Theme::Logo slide media id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Theme::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "theme" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Theme::Side Menu Icon media id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; FAT Theme::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; "theme" ) & SetProperty ( "source_mediafield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Theme::Block divider image id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

Comment.value: Find all colors in the theme template
Check if predefined color exist in Title
if re_import and pre-defined does not exist -> duplicate from theme
Added 2025-02-12 - We need to ensure that templates cannot use duplicate names either!
Find all text styles in the theme template

Calculation.Text: FAT Theme TextStyle::Predefined Text style Name

Comment.value: Check if predefined color exist in Title
if re_import and pre-defined does not exist -> duplicate from theme
Find all fonts in the theme and delete them
Find all fonts in the theme template
